title: Ibex | Upholstered Seat & Mesh Back Multi-Tilter MVL2803
brand_hint: OTG / Offices to Go (look for MVL or OTG model code)

specs.manufacturer: OTG / Offices to Go (a division of Global Furniture Group)
specs.notes: Specifications pulled from the official OTG Canada manufacturer page (en-ca). The page confirmed dimensions, seat height range, and weight for MVL2803 specifically. The US OTG2803 page meta-description references seat height adjustment, height-adjustable arms, and adjustable lumbar support — cross-applied as features for MVL2803. Finishes/fabric colour options, weight capacity, certifications, and warranty terms were not available in the retrieved page content; additional searches were rate-limited before those details could be confirmed. Confidence rated 'medium' because core dimensional specs come from the manufacturer page but several fields remain unconfirmed.
